_doc: Effect keys the inert audit flags that are consumed another way.
Each entry says how, so a genuine regression is not hidden behind one.

waivers.nuclear_devices: Recorded as the counter project_effect:nuclear_devices, which the strike and stockpile paths read.
waivers.thermonuclear_devices: Recorded as the counter project_effect:thermonuclear_devices, read the same way.
waivers.power_source_coal: Descriptive label. The swap is implemented in converted_power_plant, matched on the project name.
